name: Mushroom, Poblano, and Potato Tacos

ingredients.item: of creme fraiche, Mexican crema, or sour cream

method: Get a boiler or a gas burner, and roast poblanos for around 10
minutes.
Take it out in a bowl, then cover. Let it cool for around 10 minutes.
Cut them into strips.
Place potatoes in a nonstick skillet; cover them with cold water, and
season with the salt.
Cook over the medium heat. Cook until they are tender, then drain.
Take a skillet and heat oil over the medium heat.
Put potatoes in it; cook until they are crisp and golden for 4 minutes.
Drain them on paper towels.
Sprinkle with salt and herbs.
Remove excess oil.
Take a skillet and heat butter over the medium heat.
Put the onion in it, and cook until it is golden.
Put mushrooms in it, and cook until they are golden.
Mix garlic and herbs; cook for 1 minute.
Put roasted poblanos, lime juice, crema, and some water; stir
for 1-2 minutes.
Add pepper and salt.
Serve mushroom mixture and potatoes in tortillas with
toppings.
